Who I Am
About Me

I am Usama Riaz Awan — a Strategic Communication and Public Relations professional with 3+ years of experience helping brands, institutions, and organizations build powerful narratives, grow public presence, and lead with purpose in the digital age.

I hold a BS in Communication & Media Studies (CGPA 3.3) from the University of Sargodha, with a specialization in Strategic Communication & Public Relations. My academic foundation — combined with real-world experience across national and international markets — positions me at the intersection of PR, AI innovation, brand strategy, and media management.

My ISPR internship with Pakistan Army's Inter-Services Public Relations sharpened my expertise in national security narratives, crisis communication, and high-stakes strategic messaging. My academic research on AI Against Misinformation positions me at the frontier of responsible AI use in communication.

I was recognized as a National Emerging Leader (NLC 2026) — not for a single achievement, but for years of consistent contribution: leading university societies, volunteering at national levels, managing large-scale events, mentoring students, coordinating with ORIC and CDC, and driving communication initiatives that created real societal impact.

Career Mission

"To build communication systems that don't just deliver messages — but create movements, shape perceptions, and drive lasting impact for organizations that dare to lead."

Recognition & Honors
Key Achievements
Highest National Honor

National Emerging Leader Award — NLC 2026

Recognized at Pakistan's National Leadership Conference 2026 as a National Emerging Leader for Outstanding Leadership Potential and Impactful Services for Society. Received from Prof. Dr. Masood Sarwar Awan, Pro-Vice Chancellor, University of Sargodha. Featured on the official University of Sargodha page. Endorsed by NYLP, PEMRA, CIT, Pakistan Institute of China Studies (PICS) & IHRC-RFT.

Why Selected — A Journey of Consistent Impact
  • Led E-Media Society, UOS TV Society & Punjab Student Council
  • Coordinated with ORIC & CDC at national & university level events
  • Media Head — Research Arena 2025 & Career Fair 2026
  • Mentored students on AI & Brand Building (UOS SDP 2024)
  • Recognized: Top 100 Leading Volunteers of Pakistan
  • AMCAP-UOS International Media Conference 2024 coordination
NLC 2026 · Pakistan
01 · Defense PR

ISPR Summer Internship 2025 — Pakistan Army

Completed Pakistan Army's most competitive communication internship. Certificate signed by Lt. Gen. Ahmed Sharif Chaudhry, DG ISPR. Contributed to Truth Shield: AI Against Propaganda.

02 · International Recognition · UAE

Award & Shield — University of Sharjah, UAE

Received award certificate and shield from Dr. Jason Gainous and Dr. Tevhide Serra — Professors of Mass Communication, University of Sharjah, UAE — after coordinating AMCAP-UOS International Media Conference 2024.

03 · National Competition

2nd Position — AI & Design Fusion, Daira 2025

FAST-NUCES Chiniot-Faisalabad Campus. National-level AI and design competition. Certificate signed by Director FAST-NUCES CFD and Convener Daira 2025.

04 · Expert Mentor

AI Brand Building Mentor — ORIC & CDC, UOS 2024

Received Certificate of Achievement from ORIC, CDC, and Vice Chancellor of University of Sargodha for mentoring students on AI-based brand building and content creation strategies.

05 · National Volunteer

Ambassador — Volunteer Force Pakistan · Top 100

Recognized among Pakistan's Top 100 Leading Volunteers for sustained community service, youth development, and social impact — a national civic leadership honor.

06 · Academic Excellence

Final Year Research — Dual Project Submission

Submitted AI Against Misinformation (n=50) and DCMS Digital App (n=100, 81% adoption intent) — two major research projects recognized by faculty. Post received 3K+ Instagram views.

Research & Innovation
Research & AI Innovation
Strategic Communication Research · UOS 2026

AI Against Misinformation — Strategic Campaign & Research Study

Designed a full strategic communication campaign targeting digital misinformation among Pakistani youth. Theme: "Think Before You Share, Verify Before You Amplify." Conducted primary survey research (n=50), profiled AI fact-checking tools (ChatGPT, Snopes, InVID), analyzed misinformation patterns, and proposed an AI-powered fact-checking chatbot. Received academic recognition from faculty panel at University of Sargodha.

Survey Research (n=50)AI ToolsStrategic Comm.Digital LiteracyMisinformation Detection
Applied Research & Innovation · UOS 2026

DCMS Digital App — Academic Communication Platform

Conceptualized and validated a department-based academic mobile application for UOS. Formative research (n=100) confirmed 81% adoption intent and 77% belief in improved academic communication. Delivered SWOT analysis, audience profiling, full app prototype, and integrated advertising strategy. Final Semester Project supervised by Dr. Mudassar Hussain Shah, Advertising #MCOM-6145.

Formative Research (n=100)81% Adoption IntentApp DesignSWOT AnalysisCampaign Strategy

Value Proposition
Why Work With Me
🧠

Strategic Thinking, Not Just Execution

Every campaign I design is rooted in PR frameworks, audience psychology, and measurable outcomes — not just content creation. I build communication architectures that last.

🤖

AI-First Communication

I integrate AI tools into communication workflows — accelerating content production, enhancing personalization, and scaling impact without sacrificing strategic quality or brand integrity.

🪖

Crisis-Trained Communicator

ISPR-trained in national security PR, crisis communication, and information warfare analysis. I understand high-stakes messaging and can manage communication under pressure at the highest level.

🔬

Research-Backed Decisions

Two major academic studies, SWOT analysis, and audience profiling ground every strategy in evidence — setting my work apart from intuition-only practitioners in the field.

🌍

International Experience

UAE healthcare brands, global tech firms (UK/USA/Europe/Asia), cross-cultural communication managed remotely — proven international capability and readiness from day one.

🏆

Recognized National Leader

National Emerging Leader 2026, Top 100 Volunteers of Pakistan, and multiple national-level recognitions — credibility, network, and the mindset of someone who leads, not just manages.
